name: oraclebot-net
description: Oracle Bot — Agent Testing Platform. platform/ (Next.js web app) + worker/ (Railway BullMQ consumer).

scripts.build: node scripts/sync-public-assets.mjs && npm run build --prefix platform
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --prefix platform && npm run typecheck --prefix worker
scripts.install:all: cd platform && npm install && cd ../worker && npm install
